about.subtitle: Global Ancestral Temple Travel
about.missionText1: Help 1 million people visit ancestral temples and build a global network of religious and cultural peace ambassadors.
about.missionText2: Ancestral Temple Travel is dedicated to connecting religious and cultural holy sites worldwide, enabling every traveler to deeply understand the spiritual origins of human civilization and achieve spiritual growth on the pilgrimage journey.
about.feature1: Covering 12 major faith systems including Buddhism, Taoism, Christianity, and Islam
about.feature2: Smart trip planning with AI assistant Xiaohong for optimal pilgrimage routes
about.feature3: Pilgrimage journals to record spiritual insights and share with global travelers
about.feature4: Caoxi Thirty Seals collection system to track your practice journey
privacy.intro: Welcome to Ancestral Temple Travel (JOINUS.COM). We understand the importance of your personal information and will do our best to protect it. This Privacy Policy applies to all services provided by Ancestral Temple Travel. Please read it carefully.
privacy.footer: JOINUS.COM Global Ancestral Temple Travel Platform
privacy.section1Intro: We may collect the following information when you use our services:
privacy.section1Item1: 1. Account information: phone number, nickname, avatar and other registration details
privacy.section1Item2: 2. Location information: we may access your geographic location when you use map and navigation features
privacy.section1Item3: 3. Trip information: pilgrimage trips you create, saved holy sites, journals and reviews
privacy.section1Item4: 4. Device information: device model, OS version, unique device identifiers
privacy.section1Item5: 5. Log information: access times, pages viewed, search records and other usage data
privacy.section2Intro: The information we collect will be used for the following purposes:
privacy.section2Item1: 1. Providing and improving core service features
privacy.section2Item2: 2. Recommending personalized pilgrimage routes and holy site content
privacy.section2Item3: 3. Sending trip reminders, order notifications and service messages
privacy.section2Item4: 4. Conducting data analysis to optimize user experience
privacy.section2Item5: 5. Ensuring account security and preventing fraud
privacy.section3Intro: We will not sell your personal information to any third party. We may share your information in the following circumstances:
privacy.section3Item2: 2. As required by laws, regulations or mandatory government requirements
privacy.section3Item3: 3. Sharing necessary order information with merchant partners to complete service delivery
privacy.section3Item4: 4. For statistical analysis and academic research after anonymization
privacy.section4Text1: We use industry-standard security measures to protect your personal information, including encrypted data transmission, access control, and security audits.
privacy.section4Text2: Your personal information is stored on secure servers. Cross-border transfers will comply with applicable laws and regulations.
privacy.section5Item1: 1. Access and correct your personal information
privacy.section5Item2: 2. Delete your account and related data
privacy.section5Item5: 5. Obtain a copy of your personal information
privacy.section6Text: We value the protection of minors' personal information. If you are under 14 years old, please use our services under the guidance of your guardian, who should provide personal information on your behalf.
privacy.section7Text: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. For significant changes, we will notify you through in-app notifications or other reasonable means. Continued use of our services indicates your agreement to the updated policy.
privacy.section8Text1: If you have any questions or suggestions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us:
privacy.section8Text2: We will respond to your request within 15 business days.
terms.intro: Welcome to Ancestral Temple Travel (JOINUS.COM) Global Ancestral Temple Travel Platform. Please read and understand the following Terms of Service before using our services. By using our services, you agree to comply with these terms.
terms.footer: JOINUS.COM Global Ancestral Temple Travel Platform
terms.section1Text1: Ancestral Temple Travel (JOINUS.COM) is a global religious and cultural travel service platform providing holy site browsing, pilgrimage trip planning, route booking, and community interaction.
terms.section1Text2: We continuously improve and optimize our services and may add, adjust, or discontinue certain features with prior notice.
terms.section2Intro: Some features require account registration. When registering, you should:
terms.section2Item1: 1. Provide truthful, accurate, and complete personal information
terms.section2Item2: 2. Safeguard your account and password, and be responsible for all activities under your account
terms.section2Item3: 3. Not transfer, lend, or share your account with others
terms.section2Item4: 4. Contact us immediately if you notice any account abnormalities
terms.section3Intro: When using our services, you should follow these guidelines:
terms.section3Item1: 1. Comply with applicable laws and international treaties
terms.section3Item2: 2. Respect all religious beliefs and cultural traditions; do not post sacrilegious content
terms.section3Item3: 3. Do not publish false, misleading, or rights-infringing information
terms.section3Item4: 4. Do not interfere with normal platform operations or other users' usage
terms.section3Item5: 5. Do not use the platform for any illegal activities
terms.section3Item6: 6. Respect other users' privacy and personal information
terms.section4Intro: Content you publish on the platform (journals, reviews, guides, photos, collectively 'User Content') must comply with:
terms.section4Item1: 1. Be truthful and objective, without false or misleading information
terms.section4Item2: 2. Not infringe any third party's intellectual property, portrait rights, or other legal rights
terms.section4Item3: 3. Not contain illegal, obscene, violent, or discriminatory content
terms.section4Item4: 4. Respect religious culture and not publish content that hurts religious feelings
terms.section5Intro: When booking routes and services through our platform:
terms.section5Item1: 1. Please carefully read route details, pricing, and cancellation policies
terms.section5Item2: 2. Please attend on time after successful booking; contact us in advance for changes
terms.section5Item3: 3. Refunds after payment will follow the cancellation policy
terms.section5Item4: 4. For cancellations due to force majeure, we will assist with refund processing
terms.section6Text1: All content on the platform, including but not limited to text, images, audio, video, software, and data, is the intellectual property of JOINUS.COM or relevant rights holders.
terms.section6Text2: You retain original rights to your User Content while granting us a non-exclusive license to display and promote it on the platform.
terms.section7Intro: To the extent permitted by law:
terms.section7Item1: 1. Religious and cultural information on the platform is for reference only and does not constitute religious guidance
terms.section7Item2: 2. We are not directly responsible for the quality of services provided by third-party merchants
terms.section7Item3: 3. Service interruptions due to network or equipment issues will be restored as soon as possible
terms.section7Item4: 4. Disputes between users should be resolved through mutual negotiation; the platform may assist in mediation
terms.section8Text: We reserve the right to modify these Terms of Service at any time. After changes, we will notify users through in-app announcements. Continued use of our services indicates acceptance of the modified terms.
terms.section9Text: These terms are governed by applicable law. Disputes arising from these terms or use of services should be resolved through friendly negotiation; if negotiation fails, they shall be submitted to a court with jurisdiction.
terms.section10Text1: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us:
terms.section10Text2: We are dedicated to serving you.
